info.title: dt
info.description:
Copyright © 2022-2025 by ScaleOut Software, Inc.
start      Deploys and starts a digital twin model.
pack       Builds and packs a digital twin model into a zip file.
stop       Stops a digital twin model.
status     Shows a list of running digital twin models.
help       Display more information on a specific command.
version    Display version information.

commands.name: start
commands.description: Deploys and starts a digital twin model.

options.name: --zip
options.description: Deploys the specified digital twin zip package.

options.name: --assemblyname
options.description:
Filename of assembly to execute. Defaults to the
assembly built by current directory's project file.

options.name: --localdev
options.description:
Starts local development process from build directory
without packaging.

options.name: --name
options.description:
Digital twin model name. Defaults to the name of the
assembly built by current directory's project file.

options.name: --conn
options.description:
ScaleOut connection string. Defaults to SOSS_DT_CONN
environment variable.

options.name: --buildconfig
options.description:
(Default: Release) (Ignored if -z is used.) Build
configuration.

options.name: --runtime
options.description:
(Ignored if -z is used.) Packs the application with a
specified .Net runtime (win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If
omitted, the targeted .NET runtime needs to be
pre-installed on the ScaleOut host machines.

options.name: --trim
options.description:
(Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims
unused framework libraries from the package.

options.name: --params
options.description: Startup params to send to digital twin worker process.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: pack
commands.description: Builds and packs a digital twin model into a zip file.

options.name: --buildconfig
options.description: (Default: Release) Build configuration.

options.name: --runtime
options.description:
Packs the application with a specified .Net runtime
(win-x64, linux-x64, etc.). If omitted, the targeted .NET
runtime needs to be pre-installed on the ScaleOut host
machines.

options.name: --trim
options.description:
(Ignored if -z is used.) If -r is specified, trims unused
framework libraries from the package.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --name
options.description: Digital twin model name.

options.name: --conn
options.description:
ScaleOut connection string.  Defaults to SOSS_DT_CONN
environment variable.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.description: Shows a list of running digital twin models.

options.description:
ScaleOut connection string.  Defaults to SOSS_DT_CONN
environment variable.
